_comment: A single export touching MULTIPLE distinct sanctioned entities at once — a consolidation wallet that received from both the Tornado Cash router (0x722122df12d4e14e13ac3b6895a86e84145b6967, CYBER2) and a Lazarus Group address (0x098b716b8aaf21512996dc57eb0615e2383e2f96, DPRK3), then fanned out. Demonstrates multi-source taint attribution: both SDN anchors surface as critical direct hits and both flows taint the consolidation node. All non-SDN addresses are fictional placeholders.
